title: Structured Nourishment
subtitle: Building a steady and balanced routine
description: At this stage, appetite often improves and discomfort may reduce. This allows you to move toward a more structured and balanced diet, helping support your energy and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Better ability to follow regular meal patterns
nutrition_focus: Include all major food groups in meals
Focus on balanced and complete nutrition
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, and guava
Vegetables including spinach, beans, carrots, and लौकी
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, and eggs (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: A structured and balanced diet can help you feel more energized and steady.

diabetes.personalized_description: A structured meal routine supports stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced and timely meals help maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Improved appetite supports better inclusion of iron-rich foods for strength.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Balanced nutrition helps build strength steadily.

hypertension.personalized_description: A structured and balanced diet supports stable blood pressure levels.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent and balanced meals support a calm routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A steady and structured diet supports overall metabolic balance.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and balance help your body function smoothly.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, a structured and balanced diet helps maintain stability and comfort.
priority_nutrition: Avoid skipping meals or irregular eating
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady and structured nourishment supports your overall well-being.
